task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: 01-1-035 Enable firmware update of curing components [Parameters]

desc.p: Enable firmware update of curing components

section.title: Function
section.p: Parameter to enable/disable the firmware update of the curing controller (01PBA03) and the pre and post curing lamps (01PBA01 and (01PBA02).

Disabling the firmware update is only allowed when the automatic update keeps failing. In that case the curing controller should be replaced as soon as possible and the firmware update must be enabled again. Contact HQ Service for more information.

note.p: If for some reason upgrading fails, you can temporarily disable the firmware upgrade to the curing components by means of the parameter. The printer can then still be used. A new UV lamp controller (01PBA03) needs to be installed and the parameter must be set back to 1 in order to get the mandatory FirmWare upgrade.
